channel.title: Defense in Depth on Chen Kai Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Defense in Depth on Chen Kai Blog

item.title: Security Engineering: Defense Without Paranoia
item.description:
The Kind of Security That Disappears#

I used to think security was something you bolted on: a checklist before release, a penetration test once a quarter, a code review with the word “security” in the title. I was wrong. The systems I have built over the past two years taught me a different lesson: the best security is the kind you forget about because it is already woven into the system itself.
